step_rationale: Binds triglyceride-rich lipoproteins and Lp(a); drives foam cell formation.
mechanism: VLDL receptor mediates atherogenic lipoprotein uptake and foam cell differentiation in atherosclerotic lesions.

references.title: Triglyceride Rich Lipoprotein -LPL-VLDL Receptor and Lp(a)-VLDL Receptor Pathways for Macrophage Foam Cell Formation.
